case_title: NATHAN DURAN VS. JEFF WONG et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-22-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JEFF WONG AND KRISTY MO'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S PRAYER FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS NOT PERMITTED BY EITHER THE TORT OF ANOTHER DOCTRINE, CAL. GOVERNMENT CODE 38773.5, OR SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CODE, ARTICLE 11 SECTION 610. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Set For Trial On Jul-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn To Strike Pltf'S Prayer For Attorney'S Fees; Memo Of P & A And Pos
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
P. Richard Colombatto, Esq., of Stratman, Patterson & Hunter, Tel. 510.326.5605, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JEFF WONG and KRISTY MO'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Prayer For Attorney'S Fees is Granted. Plaintiff's request for attorney's fees is not permitted by either the tort of another doctrine, Cal. Government Code 38773.5, or San Francisco Health Code, Article 11 section 610. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Set For Trial On Jul-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Off Calendar
